mapper.select: SELECT r.rule_id AS ruleId, r.rule_type AS ruleType, r.price_value AS priceValue, CASE r.rule_type WHEN 'LIST' THEN r.price_value WHEN 'OVERRIDE' THEN r.price_value WHEN 'DISCOUNT_PCT' THEN ROUND(#{qty} * i.list_price * (1 - r.price_value), 6) / #{qty} WHEN 'DISCOUNT_AMT' THEN GREATEST(i.list_price - r.price_value, 0) ELSE i.list_price END AS finalPrice, i.list_price AS basePrice FROM ( SELECT r.* FROM t_price_rule r WHERE r.price_list_id = ( COALESCE( (SELECT pl.price_list_id FROM t_customer c JOIN t_price_list pl ON pl.price_list_id = c.price_list_id WHERE c.customer_id = #{customerId} AND pl.is_active = 'Y' AND pl.valid_from <= #{asOf} AND (pl.valid_to IS NULL OR pl.valid_to >= #{asOf})), (SELECT price_list_id FROM t_price_list WHERE is_default = 'Y' AND is_active = 'Y' AND valid_from <= #{asOf} AND (valid_to IS NULL OR valid_to >= #{asOf}) LIMIT 1) ) ) AND r.is_active = 'Y' AND r.valid_from <= #{asOf} AND (r.valid_to IS NULL OR r.valid_to >= #{asOf}) AND (r.item_id IS NULL OR r.item_id = #{itemId}) AND (r.category_id IS NULL OR r.category_id = i.category_id) AND (r.customer_id IS NULL OR r.customer_id = #{customerId}) AND r.min_qty <= #{qty} AND (r.max_qty IS NULL OR r.max_qty > #{qty}) ORDER BY r.priority, CASE WHEN r.item_id IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, CASE WHEN r.customer_id IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, CASE WHEN r.category_id IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, r.rule_id LIMIT 1 ) r JOIN t_item i ON i.item_id = #{itemId}
mapper.update: UPDATE t_so_line sl JOIN t_sales_order so ON so.so_id = sl.so_id SET sl.unit_price = ( SELECT COALESCE(r.price_value, i.list_price) FROM t_price_rule r JOIN t_item i ON i.item_id = sl.item_id WHERE r.price_list_id = COALESCE( (SELECT c.price_list_id FROM t_customer c WHERE c.customer_id = so.customer_id), (SELECT price_list_id FROM t_price_list WHERE is_default = 'Y' AND is_active = 'Y' LIMIT 1)) AND r.is_active = 'Y' AND (r.item_id IS NULL OR r.item_id = sl.item_id) ORDER BY r.priority LIMIT 1 ) WHERE sl.so_id = #{soId} AND sl.line_status != 'CANCELLED'
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY r.priority, CASE WHEN r.item_id IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, CASE WHEN r.customer_id IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, CASE WHEN r.category_id IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, r.rule_id ) AS matchSeq, CASE WHEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY r.priority, CASE WHEN r.item_id IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, CASE WHEN r.customer_id IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, CASE WHEN r.category_id IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, r.rule_id ) = 1 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS hitFlag FROM t_price_rule r WHERE r.price_list_id = COALESCE( (SELECT c.price_list_id FROM t_customer c WHERE c.customer_id = #{customerId}), (SELECT price_list_id FROM t_price_list WHERE is_default = 'Y' AND is_active = 'Y' LIMIT 1)) AND r.is_active = 'Y' AND r.valid_from <= #{asOf} AND (r.valid_to IS NULL OR r.valid_to >= #{asOf}) AND (r.item_id IS NULL OR r.item_id = #{itemId}) ORDER BY matchSeq
